overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dystopian neon-lit urban environment with elevated walkways, makeshift stalls, and a retro arcade. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, vibrant neon signage in Japanese and English, and transitions from outdoor elevated paths to indoor arcade spaces and narrow corridors.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated concrete pathway beneath a large overpass structure

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure spanning across the scene with metal railings
tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays
green metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
food vendor stall with illuminated signage reading BIG BITES
flight of concrete stairs leading up to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy night beneath a massive concrete overpass. The camera moves forward along an elevated walkway lined with a green metal railing, passing corrugated metal shacks and a food stall. Neon billboards glow in the distance through the haze, and concrete stairs lead upward ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway transition to upper wooden platform

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs from lower walkway to upper elevated platform

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs to reach upper wooden platform area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside wooden food stall

entered.detail: elevated walkway constructed from wooden planks and metal supports
illuminated vending machine with colorful advertisements
walls made of corrugated metal sheets forming makeshift buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs, transitioning from the open overpass area to a more enclosed upper level with wooden platforms. Corrugated metal walls line the left side while a vending machine stands on the right. A vendor is visible near a small stall as the path continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: retro arcade with vintage gaming machines

events.description: enters indoor arcade space with red velvet curtains and neon lighting
ambient lighting shifts to intense red neon as camera moves deeper into arcade

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow aisle between rows of retro arcade cabinets

entered.detail: row of vintage gaming cabinets with glowing screens and Japanese text
red neon sign shaped like a heart mounted on the wall
red neon sign displaying 24 with Japanese characters
heavy red curtains lining the walls of the arcade

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow indoor arcade, the scene is bathed in red neon light from heart-shaped signs and a glowing 24 sign. Rows of retro gaming machines with illuminated screens line both sides of the carpeted floor. The space feels enclosed and intimate, separated from the outside city noise.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with market stalls

events.description: exits arcade through red curtains back to outdoor elevated walkway
camera turns right to follow the curve of the wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden elevated pathway passing small market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and mask walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: elevated path made of wooden planks with metal railings
small wooden stall with illuminated interior and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: Exiting the arcade through heavy red curtains, the scene returns to the open air on a wooden elevated walkway. The camera turns right along the path, passing a pedestrian in white clothing. A small vendor stall stands on the left while the neon city skyline glows in the distance through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered passage between corrugated metal structures

events.description: enters narrow covered corridor with corrugated metal walls
descends metal staircase within the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight corridors and descending metal stairs

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt leaning against corrugated wall

entered.detail: tight passage between makeshift buildings with low overhead cover
steep metal staircase with railings leading downward
pipes releasing steam into the narrow alleyway

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a confined corridor between corrugated metal shacks, illuminated by red and green neon lights. The camera descends a metal staircase, passing steam vents on the right. A person in a green shirt stands leaning against the wall on the left as the descent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop overlook with panoramic city view

events.description: emerges from narrow passage to open overlook with view of neon city skyline

agents.ego_description: approaching overlook to view the expansive neon-lit city skyline

entered.detail: panoramic view of towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements
tall buildings with bright pink and blue neon signage including HOTEL

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens to a breathtaking overlook of the cyberpunk city skyline. Towering neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the horizon, with the overpass bridge visible in the distance. The wooden walkway continues forward, offering an expansive view of the dystopian metropolis below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy, open-air urban overpass into the intimate, neon-drenched interior of a retro arcade. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, gliding along an elevated walkway with green metal railings past corrugated shacks and glowing distant billboards. As the camera ascends a set of concrete stairs, the environment shifts from the hazy open air to a more enclosed upper level characterized by wooden platforms, metal walls, and a solitary vending machine. The scene then transitions seamlessly into a narrow indoor arcade, where the cool night fog is replaced by a saturated red glow from heart-shaped neon signs. Finally, the camera moves deeper into this enclosed space, passing rows of illuminated gaming machines that line the carpeted floor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate interior of an arcade out into a vast, neon-drenched urban panorama. It begins by pushing through heavy red curtains onto a wooden elevated walkway, where the camera turns right past a pedestrian and a small vendor stall while the city skyline glows through a thick fog. As the path narrows, the environment shifts into a confined corridor of corrugated metal shacks illuminated by red and green neon, leading the camera down a metal staircase past hissing steam vents and a leaning figure. The scene then opens abruptly as the camera emerges from the passage, transitioning from the claustrophobic alleyway to a breathtaking overlook. Finally, the wooden walkway extends forward, revealing an expansive view of towering skyscrapers and a distant overpass bridge dominating the dystopian metropolis.
